title: Iron's Bountiful Birds
description: Adds a variety of new vanilla-styled parrot textures
body:
![Bountiful Birds Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bde639f6354b044976fa29c9a3948641af4b6e1.png)

Bountiful Birds is a basic, vanilla-styled texture pack that adds a bunch of new parrot texture options to the game! **An entity texture randomizer mod capable of consuming Optifine texture packs is required for this pack to function!**


### Mod Options:
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) (Base mod is Forge only, can run in Fabric using OptiFabric) (Ensure that you have the Video Settings > Quality > Random Entity setting turned ON)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

 Note: this section is not meant to be a comprehensive list of all mods out there. These are just the ones I'm familiar with.


### Parrot Textures:

- African Gray Parrot
- Bourke's Parakeet
- Budgerigar/Budgie/Parakeet (Green/Yellow, Blue/White)
- Caique (Black-headed)
- Cockatiel (Natural Grey, Pied, Cinnamon, Whiteface, Lutino)
- Cockatoo (Rose-breasted/Galah, Major Mitchell's, Sulphur Crested, Palm)
- Conure (Sun, Green-cheeked)
- Eclectus Parrot (Male/female)
- Lovebird (Rosy-faced/Peach-faced, Fischer's)
- Macaw (Scarlet, Green-winged, Blue and Gold, Harlequin, Military, Hyacinth)
- Meyer's Parrot
- Quaker Parrot/Monk Parakeet (Green, Blue)
- Rose-ringed Parakeet/Ring-necked Parakeet (Green, Blue, Lutino)
- Rainbow Lorikeet
- Rosella (Eastern, Pale-headed)
- Senegal Parrot

### Notes:
- Do NOT redistribute this texture pack and/or claim as your own in whole or in part. You may NOT extract my textures to add to your own texture packs.
- Do NOT reupload this texture pack to other sites.
- You are welcome to share screenshots, video, etc. for personal or commercial use featuring my textures. All I ask is you provide credit where applicable.
